nasb.text: The priest shall sprinkle the blood on the altar of the Lord at the doorway of the tent of meeting, and offer up the fat in smoke as a soothing aroma to the Lord.

esv.text: And the priest shall throw the blood on the altar of the Lord at the entrance of the tent of meeting and burn the fat for a pleasing aroma to the Lord.

cnv.text: 祭司要把血潑在會幕門口耶和華的祭壇上，把脂肪焚燒，獻給耶和華作馨香的祭。

ccb.text: 祭司要将祭牲的血洒在会幕门口耶和华的祭坛上，把脂肪焚烧献给耶和华作馨香之祭。
